contract: The console must never render an UNEARNED green. It is not required to be green.

results.proves: the 2 LIVE panels are integrity/authority which are COMPUTED ON REQUEST (freshness==0.0); 0.0 > 0 is false, so LIVE is correct
faithfully reports a REAL HJOS contradiction rather than a green

defect_found_in_my_own_console.bug: state guard was `fresh!=null && fresh>budget ? STALE : LIVE` — an endpoint returning NO freshness_seconds fell through to LIVE
defect_found_in_my_own_console.impact: absent evidence rendered as liveness — a fake-green vector
defect_found_in_my_own_console.fix: fail-closed: fresh==null -> UNKNOWN. Applied to console.html AND frontend/index.html
defect_found_in_my_own_console.caught_by: the browser proof (2/7 panels LIVE at BUDGET=0)

defect_found_in_my_own_test.bug: first test asserted 'API healthy => global LIVE' — i.e. it asserted a GREEN OUTCOME
defect_found_in_my_own_test.impact: it FAILED the console for correctly reporting CONTRADICTED
defect_found_in_my_own_test.fix: test now asserts the CONTRACT (no unearned green), not a green result

open_defect_NOT_fixed_during_freeze.finding: /api/v1/helm/soak reports freshness_seconds=3337 (~56min) while the soak is ACTIVELY writing cycles every ~50s
open_defect_NOT_fixed_during_freeze.cause: the endpoint derives freshness from soak_config.json (written once at start), not from scheduler_cycles.jsonl (live)
open_defect_NOT_fixed_during_freeze.impact: an actively-running soak renders STALE on the wall — a FALSE-RED, the inverse pathology
open_defect_NOT_fixed_during_freeze.status: REPORTED, NOT FIXED — Phase A freeze is in force; no repair-in-place until the window closes at 16:19:19Z
